debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
hr : r ≥ 0
⊢ HasFiniteIntegral (Φ₃ r) (volume.restrict (Ioc 0 1))

failed_attempts:
have h1 : Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1 ⊆ Icc 0 1 := Ioc_subset_Icc_self
  have h2 : IsCompact (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := isCompact_Icc
  have h3 : ContinuousOn (Φ₃ r) (Icc 0 1) := Φ₃_contDiffOn.continuousOn
  obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := h2.exists_bound_of_continuousOn h3
  apply HasFiniteIntegral.mono' (g := fun _ => C)
  · exact hasFiniteIntegral_const C
  · exact ae_of_all _ (fun x hx => hC x (h1 hx))

have h : Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1 ⊆ Icc 0 1 := Ioc_subset_Icc_self
  have hbdd : BoundedSpace (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := by infer_instance
  refine HasFiniteIntegral.mono_measure ?_ (Measure.restrict_mono h le_rfl)
  rw [hasFiniteIntegral_def]
  have hcont : ContinuousOn (fun t => ‖Φ₃ r t‖) (Icc 0 1) := 
    Φ₃_contDiffOn.continuousOn.norm
  have hcomp : IsCompact (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := isCompact_Icc
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hcomp.exists_bound_of_continuousOn hcont
  calc ∫⁻ a in Icc 0 1, ENNReal.ofReal ‖Φ₃ r a‖ 
      ≤ ∫⁻ _ in Icc 0 1, ENNReal.ofReal M := by
        apply MeasureTheory.lintegral_mono
        intro x
        by_cases hx : x ∈ Icc 0 1
        · exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hM x hx)
        · simp
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal M * volume (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := by
        rw [MeasureTheory.lintegral_const, MeasurableSet.univ.inter_eq]
        simp [MeasureTheory.Measure.restrict_apply MeasurableSet.univ]
    _ < ⊤ := by
        rw [Real.volume_Icc]
        simp only [sub_zero, ENNReal.ofReal_one]
        exact ENNReal.mul_lt_top ENNReal.ofReal_lt_top.ne ENNReal.one_ne_top

apply HasFiniteIntegral.mono_measure
  · exact (Φ₃_contDiffOn.continuousOn.integrableOn_compact isCompact_Icc).hasFiniteIntegral
  · exact Measure.restrict_mono Ioc_subset_Icc_self le_rfl

  exact (Φ₃_contDiffOn.continuousOn.integrableOn_compact isCompact_Icc).hasFiniteIntegral.mono_measure (Measure.restrict_mono h le_rfl)
